User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the platform, who can be a candidate, a company representative, or an admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, typically from Firebase Auth.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The user's global role on the platform. A user's association with a company is managed via Memberships.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active or suspended. Defaults to true.

isVerified.description: Whether the user has verified their email address. Defaults to false.

profile.description: User's public-facing profile information, primarily for candidates.

avatarUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biography of the user.

location.description: The user's general location (e.g., 'San Francisco, CA').

skills.description: An array of the candidate's skills.

githubUrl.description: A link to the user's GitHub profile.

linkedinUrl.description: A link to the user's LinkedIn profile.

portfolioLinks.description: An array of links to the user's personal portfolio or projects.

candidatePerformance.description: Aggregated performance metrics for a candidate, updated via background jobs.

completedTasks.description: Total number of tasks completed and evaluated.

averageScore.description: The candidate's average score across all evaluated submissions.

ranking.description: The candidate's overall ranking on the platform, recalculated periodically.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a company (tenant) that posts tasks and hires candidates.

slug.description: A unique, URL-friendly slug for the company.

description.description: A brief description of the company.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns/created the company.

domains.description: A list of domains and subdomains associated with the company.

verified.description: Whether the domain ownership has been verified.

purpose.description: The purpose of the domain (e.g., 'Primary Website', 'App Backend', 'Marketing').

industry.description: The industry the company operates in (e.g., 'Technology', 'Finance').

location.description: The company's primary location (e.g., 'San Francisco, CA').

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the company profile was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the company profile was last updated.

isActive.description: Whether the company account is active. Defaults to true.

isVerified.description: Whether the company has been verified by an admin. Defaults to false.

Membership.title: Company Membership
Membership.description: Links a user to a company with a specific role, enabling multi-tenancy. This acts as a join table, allowing a single user to be a member of multiple companies with different roles.

userId.description: The ID of the user who is a member.

companyId.description: The ID of the company the user belongs to.

role.description: The user's role within that specific company.

joinedAt.description: The timestamp when the user joined the company.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a skill-based task created by a company for candidates to complete.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

roleCategory.description: The professional vertical the task belongs to.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the task.

taskTypes.description: An array of types that categorize the task (e.g., 'Coding', 'Design').

deadline.description: The submission deadline for the task.

companyId.description: The ID of the company that created the task.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the task.

status.description: The current lifecycle state of the task.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the task was last updated.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: Represents a candidate's submission for a specific task.

taskId.description: The ID of the task being submitted for.

userId.description: The ID of the candidate who made the submission.

companyId.description: The ID of the company that owns the task (denormalized for security rules and querying).

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the submission.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when the submission was made.

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp when the submission was last updated.

value.description: The URL to the submission content (e.g., GitHub repo, Figma file) or a path to a stored file.

requestedDomains.description: Domains requested by the candidate for this submission, including their access status.

status.description: The status of the access request.

reason.description: The reason provided by the candidate for the request.

Evaluation.title: Evaluation
Evaluation.description: Represents a company's evaluation of a candidate's submission.

submissionId.description: The ID of the submission being evaluated.

score.description: The final overall score (0-100) given to the submission.

feedback.description: Constructive, high-level feedback provided by the evaluator.

evaluatedBy.description: The ID of the company user who performed the evaluation.

evaluatedAt.description: The timestamp when the evaluation was completed.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles for all roles.

/memberships/{membershipId}.description: Stores the many-to-many relationship between users and companies, defining roles within a company.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Stores all tasks created by companies.

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: Stores all candidate submissions for tasks.

/evaluations/{evaluationId}.description: Stores evaluation feedback and scores for submissions.
